title: What is SonarCloud?
markdown:
# SonarCloud: Automated Code Quality and Security

## Overview

SonarCloud by Sonar is a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform designed to help developers and organizations systematically deliver clean code. By seamlessly integrating into cloud DevOps platforms and extending CI/CD workflows, SonarCloud has become a critical tool for modern software development teams seeking to maintain high code quality standards while accelerating their development processes.

## Automated Code Review and Detection

At its core, SonarCloud performs automated code reviews with the primary objective of detecting and fixing issues with both speed and precision. The platform provides continuous inspection of projects, enabling teams to identify problems early in the development lifecycle before they reach production. This proactive approach helps organizations catch and resolve code quality issues before they become costly technical debt.

## Clean as You Code Methodology

SonarCloud operates on a "Clean as You Code" philosophy, which emphasizes maintaining code quality standards throughout the development process. The platform implements comprehensive quality gates that ensure only code meeting defined clean code standards can be released to production. This methodology focuses on progressively improving the overall quality of codebases while minimizing cost and effort, allowing development teams to stay focused on innovation rather than wrestling with legacy code issues.

## Comprehensive Language and Issue Coverage

The platform offers extensive language support and covers comprehensive issue types that matter most to development teams. This broad coverage ensures that organizations can apply consistent code quality standards across diverse technology stacks and projects, making SonarCloud a versatile solution for complex enterprise environments.

## Global Impact and Trust

SonarCloud has earned the trust of millions of developers and organizations worldwide, with the platform having analyzed more than half a trillion lines of code. This widespread adoption demonstrates Sonar's integral role in helping organizations deliver better software at scale.

## Key Takeaways

- SonarCloud is a cloud-based SaaS platform that integrates into DevOps and CI/CD pipelines for automated code review and quality assurance
- The platform uses "Clean as You Code" methodology with quality gates to ensure only approved code reaches production
- SonarCloud provides continuous inspection with comprehensive language and issue type coverage
- The platform helps organizations reduce technical debt while maintaining focus on innovation and feature development
- SonarCloud is trusted by millions of developers globally and has analyzed over half a trillion lines of code
